title: angelica villosa
intro: Angelica villosa, also known as Asian angelica or dong quai, is a perennial plant native to China and other parts of East Asia, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Angelica villosa include its ability to aid digestion, relieve menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Angelica villosa can be found in various forms, including dried roots, capsules, and teas, which are commonly used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
